title: senecio gibbosus subsp. bicolor
intro: Senecio gibbosus subsp. bicolor, also known as Balkan ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family that is native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, as well as digestive problems, and it has also been used as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture or decoction form to harness its medicinal properties.
